title: Drug Church – “Pynch”
author: Danielle Chelosky

The post Drug Church – “Pynch” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Drug Church have answered your prayers. The post-hardcore favorites are back with "Pynch," their first new music since 2024's Prude, which was our Album Of The Week.

"It's as close as we've ever come to a love song," frontman Patrick Kindlon says. "This one is about meeting someone who won't allow you to be a loser forever."

Have you ever wondered what a Drug Church love song would sound like? The lyrics are littered with oracles, flipping cars, armpits compared to wet ditches, guns, and coffins. So, it's a Drug Church song. Check it out below.
